rows.description: Polinte Varia - Brought over
rows.notes: Title at top of page with a carried-over amount. Pounds '2625' and shillings '12' are clearly aligned in the pounds/shillings columns; pence digits look like '11' though the final digit is slightly cramped by the vertical ruling line.

rows.description: Mr Shapert Provisional Stipend to L. Day
rows.notes: Description legible though surname spelling uncertain ('Shapert' read tentatively). Numeric columns are well aligned showing £12 10s 0d; values validate (shillings <20, pence <12).

rows.description: Gile & Ward. painting for Yarnton Chancel
rows.notes: Names and purpose clearly legible. Amount columns unambiguous: £3 5s 0d.

rows.description: Wm. Shreector for Gate & Chimney Piece
rows.notes: Amount £17 0s 0d is clear. The name of the payee is less certain (handwritten, read as 'Wm. Shreector'); chosen reading based on letter shapes but other spellings possible.

rows.description: Fathers for repairs in Yarnton Chancel
rows.notes: Description legible. Amount columns align to £2 8s 6d; digits clear and within valid ranges.

rows.description: Mr Hastings balance on works at
rows.notes: This line is a descriptive lead-in (no amount in the three money columns). The following line contains the actual amount for the full description; vertical brace groups these two lines.

rows.description: Campfield and half cost of measuring
rows.notes: Continuation of previous line; the amount £132 15s 0d is well aligned and clear. The brace marks grouping with the prior descriptive line.

rows.description: Bishop of Guinea - Diocesan College
rows.notes: Description mostly legible though 'Guinea' could be another place-name; amount reads clearly as £25 0s 0d.

rows.description: Abingdon Church extension Fund
rows.notes: Clear description and amount; £20 0s 0d aligned in the money columns.

rows.description: Bills for a door at South Newington
rows.notes: Amount appears as '1 4 4½' — interpreted as £1 4s 4½d (halfpenny indicated by small loop after pence). Description and numeric alignment are clear.

rows.description: Receipt Stamps
rows.notes: No pounds digit (blank) then '10' in shillings column and '0' pence — interpreted as £0 10s 0d. The leading blank pound is visible as a small mark.

rows.description: Shrubb. half of tile for zinc covering
rows.notes: Description partly contracted 'Shrubb.'; amount appears as £7 8s 0d. Handwriting of the description is moderately unclear but the numeric columns are readable.

rows.description: Mr Anstis - draining round Chancel, Kidlington
rows.notes: Name read as 'Mr Anstis' (letters clear enough). Amount aligned as £2 0s 0d.

rows.description: Loan to ye Rector - half of 3rd Instalment
rows.notes: Clear description and a large, unambiguous amount £50 0s 0d.

rows.description: Bills at Merton for Thatching
rows.notes: Amount column reads '6 10 ½' — interpreted as £6 10s and a halfpenny (0.5d). The halfpenny symbol is small and could alternatively be part of a pence digit; chosen interpretation based on spacing (no whole pence digit present).

rows.description: Two Do at Do for Gates
rows.notes: Reads '12 7 2' clearly in the money columns; 'Two Do at Do' indicates repeat work at same place. All currency digits within valid ranges.

rows.description: Timber for Poles
rows.notes: No pound amount shown (blank) then '16' in shillings column and '0' pence — interpreted as £0 16s 0d. Description clear.

rows.description: Mr Shaparts Provisional Stipend to Miss ?
rows.notes: A second provisional stipend entry with same amount as earlier. Handwriting for the recipient ('Miss ...') is indistinct; amount £12 10s 0d is clearly aligned.

rows.description: Chisickard, Bill for Thatching
rows.notes: Surname uncertain (read as 'Chisickard'); the amount '1 19 0' is clear in the money columns (£1 19s 0d).

rows.description: Do: Allowance to Clarke on Quitting Cottage
rows.notes: Label 'Do:' indicates continuation; amount is shown as shillings '15' with no pounds — taken as £0 15s 0d. Description legible.

rows.description: Franklin, Clifton Terry, Bill for bricks
rows.notes: Multiple surnames are slightly cramped but readable. Amount columns read £7 9s 0d; digits clear.

rows.description: Mr Haddon, fee for opinion in two cases submitted to him
rows.notes: Long description but legible; amount £5 5s 0d is clear and aligned.

rows.description: Bill for repairs at Merton Vicarage & School
rows.notes: Description and amount clear; reads £1 12s 6d. Vertical ruling lines used to confirm columns.

rows.description: Property Tax on the 2d half year ending April 1850 - The Gosford Tithes having been charged to Little on preceding 2d
rows.notes: Long descriptive line; some words uncertain ('Gosford Tithes' and phrase at end). Amount '29 18 2' is clearly aligned as £29 18s 2d.

rows.description: Tile for repairs at Campfield & Kidlington
rows.notes: Description legible; amount reads £53 19s 3d. All numeric columns clear and valid.

rows.description: Honor - lead Gutters - Stable at Campfield
rows.notes: Description text (first word read as 'Honor' or 'Hono(u)r') is uncertain; likely 'lead gutters' is correct. Amount £12 10s 6d is readable but the heading letters are blotchy.
Final grand total at bottom right, clearly written as '3044 13 6'. No description text on this line; numeric alignment is unambiguous.
